Hearing On Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Courtney Cassinelli, Esq. for Petitioner: Silvia Lopez, present as Guardian ad litem for: Briana Lopez, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $2,666.66
Medical Expenses $3,500.00
Costs $324.30
A net balance of $1,506.04 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 3027 16th Street, San Francisco, CA. 94103, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
